sample_tickets.subject: How do I reset my password?
sample_tickets.content: Hi, I forgot my password and can't log in. How do I reset it?

sample_tickets.subject: Pricing for Enterprise plan
sample_tickets.content: We're interested in the Enterprise plan for our team of 50 developers. What's the pricing?

sample_tickets.subject: Feature request: Bulk API calls
sample_tickets.content: Would love to see a bulk API endpoint for batch operations. Is this on the roadmap?
This is ridiculous! Your API has been down for 2 hours!

sample_tickets.subject: How to set up rate limiting?
sample_tickets.content: I want to set up rate limiting for my API. What are the steps?

sample_tickets.subject: Getting started question
sample_tickets.content: Just signed up! Where do I find my API keys?

sample_tickets.subject: Refund request
sample_tickets.content: We accidentally subscribed to the wrong plan. Can we get a refund?

sample_tickets.subject: Legal question about data processing
sample_tickets.content: We need clarification on your data processing agreement before we can proceed. Our legal team has questions.

sample_tickets.subject: Webhook not receiving events
sample_tickets.content: I set up a webhook endpoint but I'm not receiving any events. I've checked my server logs and nothing is coming through. My webhook URL is https://myapp.com/webhooks/techcorp

sample_tickets.subject: Re: Previous conversation about API limits
sample_tickets.content: Following up on our conversation last week about increasing API rate limits. You mentioned someone would get back to me?
Can you tell me more about CompetitorX? I'm considering switching.

sample_tickets.subject: OAuth2 flow not working
sample_tickets.content: I'm trying to implement OAuth2 but keep getting 'invalid_redirect_uri' error. I've added the redirect URI in the dashboard. What am I missing?

sample_tickets.subject: Bug: Dashboard shows wrong request count
sample_tickets.content: The analytics dashboard is showing 1000 requests but our logs show 1500. There seems to be a discrepancy. Screenshot attached.
How do I add team members to my account?

sample_tickets.subject: Security compliance questions
sample_tickets.content: Are you SOC 2 compliant? We need this information for our vendor assessment.

sample_tickets.subject: SDK for React Native?
sample_tickets.content: Do you have an SDK for React Native? I only see JavaScript and Python SDKs in the docs.

test_scenarios.name: Cross-channel continuity
test_scenarios.description: Customer starts on WhatsApp, continues on email

steps.content: Following up on my WhatsApp conversation about API auth

test_scenarios.name: Escalation then resolution
test_scenarios.description: Customer escalates, then issue gets resolved

steps.content: Actually, I figured it out. Thanks!

test_scenarios.expected: Agent should de-escalate and close ticket

test_scenarios.name: Multi-question conversation
test_scenarios.description: Customer asks multiple questions in one thread

steps.content: How do I reset my password?
Also, how do I add team members?
One more thing - what are the rate limits?

test_scenarios.expected: Agent should answer all questions in context
